name: Tooltip
description: Tooltip with Floating UI positioning, arrow, configurable delay, and auto-flip.

delay.description: Milliseconds before showing tooltip on hover

decision_rule: Use for supplementary info on hover/focus (icons, abbreviations, truncated text). Keep content short. In Filament, use ->tooltip() method instead.

filament_equivalent.note: In Filament, use Column::make()->tooltip() for tooltips
